description: Expense receipt or invoice. Extract payment/purchase details from this document.

date.description: Date of the receipt, invoice, or transaction as YYYY-MM-DD

supplier.description: Name of the supplier, vendor, merchant, or service provider

description.description: Short one-line summary of what was purchased or paid for (max 80 chars)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR), or null if unclear

subtotal.description: Subtotal amount before tax/VAT, or null if not shown separately

vat.description: VAT or sales tax amount, or 0 if no tax was charged, or null if unclear

total.description: Total amount paid including any tax/VAT

reference.description: Invoice number, receipt number, order ID, or reference, or null if none
